summary: Iteration 509: Full UI/UX Audit - All tests passed. Cookie consent is a small bottom-right toast (366px wide, positioned at x=1537, y=984). Explore page filters stories without thumbnails (all 64 stories have thumbnails). JourneyProgressBar only shows on story-video-studio pages (hidden on Dashboard, Battle, Viewer). Dashboard shows HottestBattle with Quick Shot CTA, then TrendingPublicFeed right after. PostValueOverlay 'Continue with limited access' stays on /app (does not redirect to studio). Login redirects to /app dashboard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 509 verified all UI/UX audit fixes. Cookie consent banner is a small toast (max-w-sm, ~366px) positioned at bottom-4 right-4 (x=1537, y=984 on 1920x1080). Accept All and Reject All buttons work and dismiss the banner. JourneyProgressBar uses window.location.pathname check in App.js to only show on story-video-studio or character-consistency pages. Dashboard layout: PersonalAlertStrip -> StreakBadge -> HottestBattle -> TrendingPublicFeed -> HeroSection. PostValueOverlay 'Continue with limited access' navigates to /app (line 49 in PostValueOverlay.jsx). Explore API filters stories without thumbnails (line 1009-1011 in engagement.py).
